name: sPrimarySpriteStats
desc: Stats of the primary sprites 0 : Spawn health 1 : Damage 2 : Suit reduction 3 : Weaknesses 4 : Health X probability 5 : Missile X probability 6 : Red X probability

name: sSecondarySpriteStats
desc: Stats of the secondary sprites 0 : Spawn health 1 : Damage 2 : Suit reduction 3 : Weaknesses

name: sZozoroPalette
desc: Has 2 graphics rows but only 1 palette row

name: sIceBeamAbilityPalette
desc: Has 2 graphics rows but only 1 palette row

name: sTankIncreaseAmounts
desc: Tank increase amounts for each difficulty (J and C only)

name: sSineTable_1
desc: Used for wavy Samus graphics on pre-results screen

name: sSineTables_Increasing
desc: Each table is 32 bytes, with heights from 0 to 64; potentially left over from WL4

name: sAnimatedPaletteEntries
desc: J and C have 1 more entry, used for flashing numbers in sector connectors

name: sBlockBg_Sector4_03_Bg2
desc: J and C remove middle path

name: sSector4_03_SpriteLayout1
desc: J and C have 1 less sprite

name: sSector4_03_SpriteLayout0
desc: J and C have 2 less sprites

name: sMinimapDataPointers
desc: Last entry is all 0s to mark end of list
